group.id: TableExt 50004 - ALP Prod Order Rtng Line Ext

trans-unit.id: TableExt 50004 - Field 50000 - ALP Actual Availability - Property Caption
TableExt 50004 - Field 50001 - ALP Actual Productivity - Property Caption
TableExt 50004 - Field 50002 - ALP Qty. Produced - Property Caption
TableExt 50004 - Field 50003 - ALP Qty. Rejected - Property Caption
TableExt 50004 - Field 50004 - ALP Source Timestamp - Property Caption

trans-unit.note: Permission set for viewing shopfloor data

trans-unit.source: Production Order %1 not found or not in Released status
trans-unit.target: Fertigungsauftrag %1 nicht gefunden oder nicht im Status Freigegeben

trans-unit.source: Routing line not found for Order %1, Operation %2
trans-unit.target: Arbeitsgangzeile nicht gefunden für Auftrag %1, Arbeitsgang %2

trans-unit.source: WorkCenter mismatch: payload has %1, routing line has %2
Qty. Rejected (%1) cannot exceed Qty. Produced (%2)
trans-unit.target: Ausschussmenge (%1) darf die produzierte Menge (%2) nicht überschreiten

trans-unit.id: Page 50020 - Control Message Id - Property ToolTip
Page 50020 - Control Message Type - Property ToolTip
Page 50020 - Control Order No. - Property ToolTip
Page 50020 - Control Operation No. - Property ToolTip
Page 50020 - Control Received At - Property ToolTip
Page 50020 - Control Processed At - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.target: Fehlermeldung, wenn die Verarbeitung fehlgeschlagen ist

trans-unit.source: View the execution data for this message
trans-unit.target: Die Ausführungsdaten für diese Nachricht anzeigen

trans-unit.id: PageExt 50021 - Control ALP Last Exec Update At - Property ToolTip
trans-unit.source: Timestamp of the last execution update received from the shopfloor system
trans-unit.target: Zeitstempel der letzten Ausführungsaktualisierung vom Fertigungssystem
trans-unit.note: ToolTip for Last Exec Update At field

trans-unit.id: PageExt 50021 - Control ALP Execution Source - Property ToolTip
trans-unit.source: Identifier of the shopfloor system that sent the last update
trans-unit.target: Kennung des Fertigungssystems, das die letzte Aktualisierung gesendet hat

trans-unit.id: PageExt 50021 - Control ALP Exec Qty. Produced - Property Caption
PageExt 50021 - Control ALP Exec Qty. Produced - Property ToolTip
trans-unit.source: Total quantity produced across all operations
trans-unit.target: Gesamtmenge, die über alle Arbeitsgänge produziert wurde

trans-unit.id: PageExt 50021 - Control ALP Exec Qty. Rejected - Property Caption
PageExt 50021 - Control ALP Exec Qty. Rejected - Property ToolTip
trans-unit.source: Total quantity rejected across all operations
Completion percentage based on good quantity vs planned quantity
trans-unit.target: Fertigstellungsgrad basierend auf Gutmenge im Verhältnis zur geplanten Menge

trans-unit.id: PageExt 50021 - Control ALP Exec Weighted Avail - Property Caption
PageExt 50021 - Control ALP Exec Weighted Avail - Property ToolTip
trans-unit.target: Mengengewichtete durchschnittliche Verfügbarkeit über alle Arbeitsgänge

trans-unit.id: PageExt 50021 - Control ALP Exec Weighted Prod - Property Caption
PageExt 50021 - Control ALP Exec Weighted Prod - Property ToolTip
trans-unit.target: Mengengewichtete durchschnittliche Produktivität über alle Arbeitsgänge

trans-unit.source: View execution events (performance metrics) for this production order

group.id: PageExt 50022 - ALP Prod Order Rtng Lines Ext

trans-unit.id: PageExt 50022 - Control ALP Qty. Produced - Property Caption
PageExt 50022 - Control ALP Qty. Produced - Property ToolTip
PageExt 50022 - Control ALP Qty. Rejected - Property Caption
PageExt 50022 - Control ALP Qty. Rejected - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Quantity good at this operation (produced minus rejected)
trans-unit.target: Gutmenge an diesem Arbeitsgang (produziert minus Ausschuss)

trans-unit.id: PageExt 50022 - Control ALP Actual Availability - Property Caption
PageExt 50022 - Control ALP Actual Availability - Property ToolTip
trans-unit.source: Actual availability ratio from shopfloor execution (0-1)

trans-unit.id: PageExt 50022 - Control ALP Actual Productivity - Property Caption
PageExt 50022 - Control ALP Actual Productivity - Property ToolTip
trans-unit.source: Actual productivity ratio from shopfloor execution (0-1)

trans-unit.id: PageExt 50022 - Control ALP Source Timestamp - Property Caption
PageExt 50022 - Control ALP Source Timestamp - Property ToolTip
trans-unit.source: Timestamp of the last execution update from the shopfloor system
trans-unit.target: Zeitstempel der letzten Ausführungsaktualisierung vom Fertigungssystem

trans-unit.id: Report 50051 - RequestPage Group Options - Property Caption
Report 50051 - RequestPage Field ReportDate - Property Caption
Report 50051 - RequestPage Field ReportDate - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.note: Label prefix for the report date
Footer branding text before company name
Column header for production order number
Column header for last update timestamp
Column header for work centers list
Caption for Actual Cycle Time field

trans-unit.source: Invalid messageId format. Expected a valid GUID.
trans-unit.target: Ungültiges messageId-Format. Eine gültige GUID wird erwartet.
trans-unit.note: Error when API receives malformed GUID

trans-unit.source: Failed to process execution event. Check Integration Inbox for details.
trans-unit.target: Ausführungsereignis konnte nicht verarbeitet werden. Prüfen Sie den Integrationseingang für Details.

trans-unit.note: Caption for Work Center Group Code field
Caption for Unit of Measure Code field
Caption for Direct Unit Cost field

trans-unit.source: Work center creation is only allowed in Sandbox environments.
trans-unit.target: Die Erstellung von Arbeitsplätzen ist nur in Sandbox-Umgebungen erlaubt.
trans-unit.note: Error when trying to create work center in non-sandbox environment

trans-unit.source: Work center modification is only allowed in Sandbox environments.
trans-unit.target: Die Änderung von Arbeitsplätzen ist nur in Sandbox-Umgebungen erlaubt.
trans-unit.note: Error when trying to modify work center in non-sandbox environment
Caption for System Modified At field

trans-unit.source: Production order creation via API is only allowed in Sandbox environments.
trans-unit.target: Die Erstellung von Fertigungsaufträgen über die API ist nur in Sandbox-Umgebungen erlaubt.
trans-unit.note: Error when trying to create production order in non-sandbox environment

trans-unit.source: Production order modification via API is only allowed in Sandbox environments.
trans-unit.target: Die Änderung von Fertigungsaufträgen über die API ist nur in Sandbox-Umgebungen erlaubt.
trans-unit.note: Error when trying to modify production order in non-sandbox environment

trans-unit.source: Production order deletion via API is only allowed in Sandbox environments.
trans-unit.target: Das Löschen von Fertigungsaufträgen über die API ist nur in Sandbox-Umgebungen erlaubt.
trans-unit.note: Error when trying to delete production order in non-sandbox environment

trans-unit.source: Production order refresh via API is only allowed in Sandbox environments.
trans-unit.target: Die Aktualisierung von Fertigungsaufträgen über die API ist nur in Sandbox-Umgebungen erlaubt.
trans-unit.note: Error when trying to refresh production order in non-sandbox environment

group.id: Page 50033 - ALP Prod Order Routing API

trans-unit.note: Caption for Prod. Order No. field
Caption for Routing Reference No. field

group.id: Page 50034 - ALP Prod Order Components API

Caption for Prod. Order Line No. field
Caption for Unit of Measure Code field
Caption for Routing Link Code field
Caption for Base Unit of Measure field
Caption for Item Category Code field
Caption for Production BOM Number field
